question: Are any currently open Stellar RFPs relevant to smart accounts or passkeys, and how do the returned briefs differ?

golden.answer: Fetch the full current open set with scout.getRfps({status:"open"}), then locally filter titles, descriptions, and technical requirements for related passkey and smart-account concepts. A q-filtered call may supplement but not replace the exhaustive open-set scan; cite deliverables and dated round metadata.
keyFacts: Fetches the full open RFP set first, then locally filters related passkey/smart-account concepts.
Compares stated deliverables and cites each returned brief.
Includes round as-of/verifyAt and scopes an empty result to the source.
avoid: Claims a remembered passkey brief is still open without current status evidence.
A narrow zero/one-hit query is not an exhaustive opportunity scan.

corroboration.claim: Relevant briefs are selected from current open rows, compared by deliverables, cited, and dated.
An archived passkey brief is necessarily still open.
